project: Fix the failing compliance-service test: `TestHandlers_ListControls_WithPagination` is timing out after 2 minutes with a panic. Investigate the ListControls handler in services/compliance-service/handlers/. The timeout suggests either: 1) an infinite loop or blocking operation in the pagination logic, 2) database connection hanging without proper timeout, 3) missing test cleanup causing resource exhaustion. Add context timeouts to database operations, ensure proper test teardown, and add debugging logs to identify the blocking call. Verify all compliance-service tests pass after fix.
